title: Emergence
description: Gives Villagers entirely new jobs to supplement their economy, as a bonus gives you new workstations!
body:
# Emergence
Emergence is a Vanilla+ Mod that attempts to make the villager economy more sustainable, as well as make trading an often better way to make things. This comes with the added bonus of new workstations to play around with!

Many villagers have the ability to create something you can't using the workstations, making them actually remarkably useful!

## Professions
There are currently two professions in the mod;

### Lumberjack
The Lumberjack is a villager that will trade in any goods related to trees & wood, their expertise can be handy to have around when you want to get more planks for your logs.

### Florist
The Florist is a villager that trades in grasses, mosses, bees, & plants, and their expertise will teach you how to get higher yields out of your dyes!

## Workstations
There are currently two workstations in the mod;

### Chopping Block
#### (Player Functionality WIP)
The Chopping Block is a workstation that allows you to do most of the wood recipes more efficiently.

### Botany Table
#### (Player Functionality WIP)
The Botany Table is a workstation that allows you to get a higher yield from dyes & get multiple colours from one flower.
